hovertext:
BAGL
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: RIR: 6, AIYR: 4, BAGR: 2, AIZR: 2, RIGR: 2, RIMR: 1
Conns out: RIR: 6, AIYR: 4, BAGR: 2, AIZR: 2, RIGR: 2, RIMR: 1

BAGR
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: RIR: 6, RIGL: 3, BAGL: 2, AIZL: 2, AIYL: 1, AVER: 1,
RIAL: 1, RIBR: 1
Conns out: RIR: 6, RIGL: 3, BAGL: 2, AIZL: 2, AIYL: 1, AVER: 1,
RIAL: 1, RIBR: 1

URXL
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: RMGL: 6, IL2L: 3, AIAL: 2, AUAL: 2, CEPVL: 1,
RIAL: 1, RIML: 1, URBL: 1
Conns out: RMGL: 6, IL2L: 3, AIAL: 2, AUAL: 2, CEPVL: 1,
RIAL: 1, RIML: 1, URBL: 1

URXR
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: AIAR: 3, RMGR: 3, ALMR: 2, IL2R: 2, AUAR: 1, RIFR: 1,
URBR: 1, RMHL: 1
Conns out: AIAR: 3, RMGR: 3, ALMR: 2, IL2R: 2, AUAR: 1, RIFR: 1,
URBR: 1, RMHL: 1

RIML
Layer 1 interneuron; motorneuron in White et al., 1986
Conns in: AVAR: 6, AVEL: 6, AVER: 3, AIBL: 2, ADER: 1, FLPL: 1,
URXL: 1, AIBR: 1, AVAL: 1, RIAL: 1, RIMR: 1, RIS: 1
Conns out: AVAR: 6, AVEL: 6, AVER: 3, AIBL: 2, ADER: 1, FLPL: 1,
URXL: 1, AIBR: 1, AVAL: 1, RIAL: 1, RIMR: 1, RIS: 1

RIMR
Layer 1 interneuron; motorneuron in White et al., 1986
Conns in: AVAL: 8, AVER: 5, AVAR: 4, AVEL: 3, AIBR: 2, BAGL: 1,
AIBL: 1, RIML: 1
Conns out: AVAL: 8, AVER: 5, AVAR: 4, AVEL: 3, AIBR: 2, BAGL: 1,
AIBL: 1, RIML: 1

SABD
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986

SABVL
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986

SABVR
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986

SIADL
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986
Conns in: RIBL: 2
Conns out: RIBL: 2

SIADR
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986
Conns in: RIBL: 1, RIBR: 1
Conns out: RIBL: 1, RIBR: 1

SIAVL
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986
Conns in: RIBL: 1, SMDVR: 1
Conns out: RIBL: 1, SMDVR: 1

SIAVR
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986
Conns in: RMDDL: 2
Conns out: RMDDL: 2

SIBDL
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986
Conns in: RIBL: 4, AIMR: 2, SIBVL: 2, SMBVL: 2, SMBDL: 1
Conns out: RIBL: 4, AIMR: 2, SIBVL: 2, SMBVL: 2, SMBDL: 1

SIBDR
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986
Conns in: RIBR: 4, SIBVR: 3, RMDDR: 2
Conns out: RIBR: 4, SIBVR: 3, RMDDR: 2

SIBVL
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986
Conns in: RIBL: 4, RIBR: 3, SIBDL: 2, SMBDL: 1, SMBDR: 1,
SMBVL: 1
Conns out: RIBL: 4, RIBR: 3, SIBDL: 2, SMBDL: 1, SMBDR: 1,
SMBVL: 1

SIBVR
Sublateral motor neuron; interneuron in White et al., 1986
Conns in: RIBR: 3, SIBDR: 3, SMBDR: 3, RIBL: 2, AIML: 1,
AVBL: 1
Conns out: RIBR: 3, SIBDR: 3, SMBDR: 3, RIBL: 2, AIML: 1,
AVBL: 1
